title: Hssiss
content:

{{Quote|Hssiss are semi-intelligent beasts, corrupted and strengthened by prolonged exposure to the dark side. As creatures of the Force, they have a limited ability to mask their presence. Hssiss are drawn to suffering and carnage. They must have fed on all the corpses left over from the war here on Korriban. The angry phantoms of the Sith, too weak to influence the sentient, have taken these Hssiss as thralls to their will.|[[Kreia]], to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Hssiss''', also called '''dark side dragons''', were a lizard species with the ability to influence [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] beings around them. If bitten by a Hssiss, one would succumb to the effects of a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] poison. Hssiss also had the ability to conceal themselves and become invisible, possibly doing so through the Force. 

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:Ktriss1.jpg|thumb|251x251px|[[Ktriss]], the pet hssiss of Great Bogga.]]
In appearance, Hssiss looked like nothing more than particularly vicious reptiles, about three meters in length, with a green, scaly hide. In addition to those three meters, they had a meter long tail, covered in rows of spikes which stretched up past their backs and onto their necks. When in the lakes on Ambria, they hunted in pairs, grasping their prey with their strong jaws and sinking dozens of teeth into the unfortunate animal's body, while the other Hssiss sunk its jagged claws into it.

Hssiss inhabited caves,<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" /> swamps, marshes, and wetlands and were usually at the top of the local food chain. They were drawn to the dark side locations that spawned them and clustered in impressive numbers.<ref name="JATM" />

[[Dark Lizard]]s were a species of hssiss.<ref name="EOTJ" />

==Force sensitivity==
{{Quote|Hssiss are enough to humble even an arrogant one such as you. Test yourself if you must, but try not to die.|Kreia, to Meetra Surik|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
[[File:HssissKOTORII.jpg|thumb|right|217x217px|A Hssiss]]
As creatures of the Force, they had a limited ability to mask their presence. Hssiss were drawn to suffering and carnage. After the [[Jedi Civil War]] and the devastation of the planet [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], they fed upon all the corpses left behind from the war, while the angry phantoms of the Sith—too weak to influence the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]]—took these Hssiss as thralls to their will, fending off all intruders who landed on the planet.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />

==History==
[[File:Siss.jpg|thumb|A Hssiss]]
Hssiss originated as savage reptilian predators on [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]], and were one of the few creatures to survive the planet's destruction. They lived in and near Lake Natth, where [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Thon]] had imprisoned the dark side energies that had plagued the planet for millennia. The dark spirits then began to possess the creatures, turning them into something much fouler—it was said that these "dark side dragons" aided those who used the dark side of the Force. Eventually, [[Bogga|Great Bogga]] began to use them as body guards and pitted them against those who had failed him. When he realized how effective and vicious they were, he had them transported off-world and sold in bulk. Soon, Hssiss could be found all over the galaxy, especially on worlds where the dark side was strong, including [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />, [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]]<ref name="FF">The Temple Guardian from ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' was identified as a hssiss in ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]''.</ref> and [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. They would eventually be used by the Sith as warbeasts.<ref name="Sith Book">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

They were found on many planets throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including Korriban, [[Oricon]], [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]], [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] and [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. Their prevalence was probably the result of being brought with [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] armies in their many wars. 

The Jedi philosopher [[Tionne Solusar]] once met with a Hssiss on the planet Ambria. She killed it by removing its head with her lightsaber, but did not escape unscathed. The Hssiss had slashed her with its claws, and only a Jedi healing trance proved able to remove the venom. This led her to believe that the poison was spawned from the dark side of the Force.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', [[Ludo Kressh]]'s [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh|tomb]] on Korriban contains an infinite hssiss spawn next to a dead Jedi. By looting the body, two Hssiss spawn. This is the basic level up glitch.

Strangely, when using [[Force vision/Legends|Force vision]] to see the Force alignment, Hssiss are colored blue for a light-sider rather than red for a dark-sider.
